componentDescription: A versatile container component designed to group and display content with various visual styles and structures.

variant.description: Defines the visual style or theme of the card.

size.description: Specifies the predefined dimensions or scale of the card.

shape.description: Determines the border-radius or overall physical contour of the card.

children.description: Content to be rendered within the main body of the card.

header.description: Content to be displayed as the card's header section.

footer.description: Content to be displayed as the card's footer section.

isFullWidth.description: If true, the card will occupy the full available width of its parent container.

views.description: Optional styling overrides for different parts of the card component.
